title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including token consumption explosion, low utility rate of token spending (18%), and circular financing problems. They cover Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and privacy-ethical concerns around AI services.
